headline: TE Connectivity PLC (NYSE:TEL) Emerges as a Top-Tier Dividend Stock for Sustainable Income
summary: TE Connectivity (TEL) offers a reliable, growing dividend backed by strong profitability and a robust balance sheet, making it a top pick for sustainable passive income.
